---
title: 'Auto Licence and Registration'
date: '2012-02-08T23:04:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4602299664655030178'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/auto-licence-and-registration.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Navigate'
---

<br />
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
Auto Registration is handled&nbsp;separately&nbsp;from drivers&nbsp;licenses&nbsp;in Texas. The auto registration is handled by the&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://www.txdmv.gov/" href="http://www.txdmv.gov/" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank">Texas Department of Motor Vehicles</a>. The Drivers Licenses are handled by the&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://www.txdps.state.tx.us/driverlicense/" href="http://www.txdps.state.tx.us/driverlicense/" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank">Texas Department of Safety</a>. Two different buildings.&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://www.texas.aaa.com/en-tx/Pages/Home.aspx" href="http://www.texas.aaa.com/en-tx/Pages/Home.aspx" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank">AAA&nbsp;</a>does not currently have a contract with the state government to offer services for auto registration or&nbsp;license&nbsp;renewal but they do still offer roadside assistance, travel, and insurance in Texas. The&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://www.texas.aaa.com/en-tx/Pages/Home.aspx" href="http://www.texas.aaa.com/en-tx/Pages/Home.aspx" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank">Texas AAA&nbsp;</a>has it's own website as well. You can often accomplish renewals at local grocery stores such as&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://www.tomthumb.com/IFL/Grocery/Home" href="http://www.tomthumb.com/IFL/Grocery/Home" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank">Tom Thumb</a>&nbsp;. Auto Registration renewal can also be done online at the&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="https://rts.texasonline.state.tx.us/NASApp/txdotrts/common/jsp/txdot_vtr_main_menu.jsp?language=eng" href="https://rts.texasonline.state.tx.us/NASApp/txdotrts/common/jsp/txdot_vtr_main_menu.jsp?language=eng" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank">TXDMV&nbsp;</a>website.</div>
